content:
2 min read
Just now

--

I’ve been working on a small browser game called Konark Run, inspired by the Konark Sun Temple in Odisha.
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Konark RunThe idea was simple: create a lightweight endless runner that anyone could play instantly. No downloads, no installation, and no ads. Just open the link and start playing.
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Konark RunModern browsers have become powerful enough to deliver smooth interactive experiences, and this project was a chance to explore what can be built with HTML5 Canvas and TypeScript while drawing inspiration from one of India’s most iconic monuments.
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Dodge,Duck,Dash.Konark Run is still evolving, and I’ll continue adding new mechanics, obstacles, and improvements based on feedback.
You can play it here:
https://www.codemedialabs.in/almanac/konark-run
If you have a few minutes, I’d love to hear what you think.
At Code Media Labs, we also work with businesses to build websites, web applications, custom software, branding, product photography, video production, and social media content.
Thanks for reading, and I hope you enjoy the game.
